summary: Full backend + frontend regression on HomeFinder. 14/14 backend pytest cases pass (health, login, MFA verify/replay, /me, properties search & filters, admin CRUD with auth gating, SessionManager Singleton). All 10 frontend flows pass (home + search filter to Lahore-only, login -> /mfa redirect with yellow simulated-code banner, MFA verify -> /admin, admin table, Add/Edit/Delete via modal, new item visible on Home, logout hides Admin link). No critical issues.

minor.issue: Test test_mfa_replay_attack_returns_401 flaked once on the very first full-suite run (r1 returned 401 instead of 200); was 100% pass on isolated rerun and on subsequent full-suite rerun. Suspect transient network hiccup. Re-run if it recurs.

issues: Spec says 'Logout returns user to Home'. Implementation redirects to /login. User can still reach Home via the 'Browse' nav link, so functionally OK, but does not match the spec exactly.

A leftover row from previous testing (Title='Test', Location='Lahore', Price=Rs.1,000) exists in the seeded DB and is shown in the first card. Not a bug per se, but consider cleaning or filtering test-prefixed entries.

action_items: Minor: the data-testid names advertised in the review_request ('admin-form-image_url', 'admin-form-submit') do NOT match the implementation ('admin-form-image', 'admin-form-save'). Either update the spec/handoff note or rename testids in /app/frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.jsx for consistency.
Minor: consider redirecting to '/' after logout (currently goes to /login) to match the spec wording.

Cleanup: a 'Test / Lahore / Rs.1,000' property is persisted in MongoDB from earlier manual testing; seed_properties() is idempotent so it stays. Provide a one-off cleanup path or a 'reset demo data' admin button.
critical_code_review_comments: SessionManager keeps sessions in-memory; mitigation already present (get_current_user reconstructs user from JWT payload on restart), good.

Auth: bcrypt + JWT used; same 401 message for unknown email & bad password (no enumeration leak); MFA codes hashed with bcrypt before storage and TTL-indexed for 5 min; replay prevented via 'used' flag — solid.

CORS: allow_origins from env (default '*') combined with allow_credentials=True — browsers reject credentialed * origins. Fine for a prototype using Bearer tokens (no cookies), but worth tightening for prod.
MongoDB _id is consistently excluded from responses via projection {'_id': 0} — good.
Frontend AdminDashboard relies on window.confirm for delete (works, but not consistent with the rest of the styled UI).
test_credentials: admin@homefinder.local / Admin@123 (seeded). MFA code returned in login response as simulated_code and shown in yellow banner on /mfa.
seed_data_creation: All TEST_-prefixed data created during tests is deleted by the same test (full Create->Update->Delete flow). No residual test data left by this run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file is at /app/backend/tests/test_homefinder_api.py — use it as regression. Conftest exposes admin_token (full login+MFA) and admin_headers fixtures. BASE_URL is read from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env. The simulated_code is surfaced in the login JSON when SIMULATE_MFA=true. Frontend admin form uses data-testid 'admin-form-image' and 'admin-form-save' (NOT 'admin-form-image_url'/'admin-form-submit' as the original spec implies).
